qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC09_REG_CUERPO.oi_reg_cuerpo oi_reg_cuerpo, ACC09_REG_CUERPO.c_reg_cuerpo c_reg_cuerpo, ACC09_REG_CUERPO.d_reg_cuerpo d_reg_cuerpo FROM ACC09_REG_CUERPO ORDER BY ACC09_REG_CUERPO.oi_reg_cuerpo ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.RegionesCuerpo.REG_CUERPO\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC09_REG_CUERPO.oi_reg_cuerpo oi_reg_cuerpo FROM ACC09_REG_CUERPO ORDER BY ACC09_REG_CUERPO.oi_reg_cuerpo ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.RegionesCuerpo.REG_CUERPO\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.RegionesCuerpo.REG_CUERPO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.RegionesCuerpo.REG_CUERPO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC09_REG_CUERPO.oi_reg_cuerpo) as CNT from ACC09_REG_CUERPO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC09_REG_CUERPO.oi_reg_cuerpo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC09_REG_CUERPO.d_reg_cuerpo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC09_REG_CUERPO.c_reg_cuerpo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
